Looking at the example in the user instruction (leaky_relu), they had both the OpDef and OP_ADD. But that example did not have the redefinition error because maybe the project JSON did not trigger autogen? Actually, the leaky_relu example used the same pattern and presumably compiled. So maybe the issue is that the project JSON for this operator is causing autogen to generate an extra REG_OP. But from the memory records, the fix is to remove the manual OP_ADD. So we will remove the namespace ops block.

Additionally, we need to adjust the kernel_src to use the correct kernel name and tiling data structure. The kernel uses GET_TILING_DATA(tiling_data, tiling) which expects a structure with fields totalLength, tileLength, etc. That's fine.

Also, note that the python_bind_src uses EXEC_NPU_CMD(aclnnCa6k00302Custom, ...). That's fine.
